cast.name: Seo Hae-won
cast.wardrobe: fair-skinned Korean woman, late 20s; cream linen sundress, wide-brim straw sun hat, tan crossbody bag, flat sandals; small gold studs; light natural makeup
cast.notes: Tourist. Baseline tier 1. Grows across the arc on emotional spikes.

cast.name: Maricel "Cel" Reyes
cast.wardrobe: morena (brown-skinned) Filipina, mid 20s; black ribbed tank top, high-waist denim cutoffs, hoop earrings, worn white sneakers, friendship bracelets; hair in a low messy bun
cast.notes: Local. Bar staff in Poblacion, hustles near the bay. Baseline tier 1. Grows across the arc.

cast.name: Dr. Elena Santos
cast.wardrobe: Filipina woman, early 50s; white lab coat over a teal blouse, ID lanyard, rimless glasses, hair in a neat low ponytail with grey streaks
cast.notes: UP Manila biochem researcher (sarcopenia compound). Non-growing. Tier 1 only.

props.description: weathered metal warning sign on a leaning post: 'BAWAL LUMANGOY / NO SWIMMING', red text on white, rust streaks, zip-tied to a rope cordon
small amber serum vial with a typed UP Manila lab label, rubber stopper, faint blue-green fluid

locations.description: UP Manila health-sciences research lab interior; stainless benches, fume hood, centrifuge, sample fridges, fluorescent light, late-night blue cast through blinds
UP Manila campus exterior in Ermita, mid-century concrete academic buildings, acacia trees, jeepneys on Padre Faura, daytime tropical haze
cordoned-off stretch of Manila Bay shoreline; concrete storm outfall pipe discharging grey runoff into the sea, rope cordon, bawal-lumangoy sign, dusk
Manila Bay at golden hour; orange-red sky, silhouetted cargo ships and bancas, breakwater rocks, crowds along the baywalk
the artificial white-sand (dolomite) beach on Manila Baywalk; pale crushed-stone sand, low wave breakers, Roxas Boulevard palms and lampposts behind
Makati CBD skyline; glass towers, RCBC/PBCom/GT towers, evening lights, money-and-heat haze
EDSA highway at rush hour; bumper-to-bumper traffic, buses and jeepneys, MRT line overhead, billboards, smog and noise
Poblacion Makati nightlife strip; neon bar signs, string lights, rooftop bars, crowded narrow streets, warm night glow
Entertainment City reclamation at night; Solaire / City of Dreams casino facades, fountains, gold-and-purple light spill across the bay
mid-rise bayfront hotel on Roxas Boulevard; room with floor-to-ceiling window facing Manila Bay, neutral modern decor, balcony

panels.action: Empty UP Manila lab at 2 a.m. Centrifuge spinning, racks of amber vials glowing under blue blinds-light.
panels.notes: Cold open. Establish the origin lab. Foreboding, clinical.

panels.action: Dr. Santos, exhausted, holds a compound-vial to the light and makes a note on a tablet.

dialogue.text: Batch nine. If the muscle uptake holds, we change how the old grow old.

panels.notes: Establish the sarcopenia compound and her hope. Sympathetic, not villainous.
panels.costume_state: dr-santos: lab coat over teal blouse, intact

panels.action: Her elbow clips a rack. A tray of vials tips; one shatters on the floor, fluid spreading toward a floor drain.

dialogue.text: No—

panels.notes: The spill. ECU on the breaking vial + drain. This is the inciting accident.
panels.costume_state: dr-santos: lab coat over teal blouse, intact

panels.action: Santos kneels with paper towels, but the blue-green fluid has already run into the floor drain. She stares at the grate.

dialogue.text: ...The drain goes to the estuary.

panels.notes: Dread beat. She realizes where it went. End page on the drain.
panels.costume_state: dr-santos: lab coat over teal blouse, intact

panels.action: Bird's-eye: campus drainage canal carries a faint blue-green sheen out past Padre Faura toward the bay.
captions: The drain goes to the estuary.
panels.notes: Begin the runoff journey. Visual continuity: the blue-green tint.

panels.action: A concrete storm outfall pipe discharges grey runoff into the bay shallows; the blue-green sheen blends into the plume.
captions: The estuary goes to the bay.
panels.notes: The delivery route arrives at the bay. The contaminated zone.

panels.action: Close on the leaning bawal-lumangoy sign and rope cordon staked into the wet sand at the outfall.
captions: And the bay does not care who is warned.
panels.notes: Plant the sign + cordon as a Chekhov prop. They'll cross it on p7.

panels.action: Splash: Metro Manila at dusk. Makati glass towers blaze; EDSA's river of taillights; casino glow far out on the bay.
captions: Money and heat. The city never lowers its voice.
panels.notes: World-establish splash. Sells the setting. Carries the casino glow on the horizon for later.

panels.action: An airport taxi crawls in EDSA gridlock under giant billboards; jeepneys box it in.
panels.notes: Introduce Hae-won via her ride in. Don't show her face yet.

panels.action: Hae-won pulls a curtain aside in her hotel room; the bay opens up in the window, light on her face.

dialogue.text: Okay. Worth the flight already.

panels.notes: First clear look at Hae-won. Tourist delight. Tier 1 baseline.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact

panels.action: Hae-won walks the pale dolomite beach, sandals in hand, phone up for the sunset, hat brim catching the light.
captions: The famous white sand. The famous sky.
panels.notes: Establish the dolomite beach + her at it. Golden hour key light.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact

panels.action: Silhouette wide: Hae-won small against the burning bay, cargo ships on the horizon, crowd along the baywalk.
panels.notes: The sunset payoff. Pure setting beauty before the meet.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact

panels.action: Cel, balancing a tray of bottled drinks she's hawking, nearly bumps Hae-won; both catch a falling bottle.

dialogue.text: Whoa—nice hands, ate. You play volleyball?

panels.notes: The meet-cute. Fair tourist + morena local. Stagger depth: Cel foreground, Hae-won mid.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: They laugh. Hae-won buys two bottles she doesn't need; Cel sits on the breakwater beside her.

dialogue.text: First time here. I don't really know anyone.
Lucky. Now you know me. I'm Cel.

panels.notes: Chemistry established. Keep it warm.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Two silhouettes on the breakwater as the sun drops, talking, the crowd thinning behind them.

dialogue.text: You want to see the real Manila? Not this postcard one?

panels.notes: Transition hook into the night tour.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Cel pulls Hae-won through the neon Poblacion crowd, string lights overhead, both grinning.

dialogue.text: This is my block. I pour drinks two streets over.

panels.notes: Cel's world. Nightlife energy. Sets up the 'hunting highs' premise visually.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: From a jeepney window, the casino strip of Entertainment City blazes gold and purple across the reclaimed bay.

dialogue.text: It's like the city is daring you to do something stupid.

panels.notes: Foreshadow. Establish Entertainment City for later high-hunting.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Back at the bay near midnight, shoes off on the dolomite sand, the water black and glassy ahead.

dialogue.text: Come on. Nobody's watching. The water's warm.

panels.notes: Drift toward the forbidden swim. Lower the inhibition.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: They reach the rope cordon. The bawal-lumangoy sign looms, lit by a far streetlight.

dialogue.text: 'Bawal lumangoy.' That means no swimming, right?

panels.notes: Payoff the planted sign. Camera echoes p02-03.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Cel, grinning, lifts the rope and ducks under it, already pulling her tank top off over a swimsuit.

dialogue.text: It means it's empty. Race you to the buoy.

panels.notes: Cel crosses the line first. Keep coverage (swimsuit underneath, always_clothed).
panels.costume_state: cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Hae-won hesitates at the cordon, then steps over it to follow, sandals left in the sand.

dialogue.text: This is so dumb. Wait for me!

panels.notes: The point of no return. Both now past the cordon.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Waist-deep, they splash and laugh near the dark outfall plume; the blue-green sheen catches moonlight on their skin.

dialogue.text: See? Best water in the city. All ours.

panels.notes: Skin contact with contaminated water. The dose. Show the sheen on skin.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: ECU on Hae-won: a sudden odd warmth, a flicker of confusion, water beading on her cheek.

dialogue.text: Do you feel that? Like... pins and needles.

panels.notes: First physiological cue. Subtle. Tier still 1.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact

panels.action: Cel shrugs it off, wading back toward shore, wringing out her hair.

dialogue.text: It's just cold. Don't be dramatic, tourist.

panels.notes: Dismiss the cue. Set up the reveal landing harder on p9-10.
panels.costume_state: cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: Dripping on the sand, they freeze as a security guard's flashlight sweeps toward them from the boardwalk.

dialogue.text: Guard. Go go go—run!

panels.notes: The adrenaline trigger: fear/thrill spike. This is what fires the growth.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, intact; cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, intact

panels.action: They sprint across the dolomite sand, hearts pounding, laughing-terrified. Mid-stride, their clothes pull tight at the shoulders and thighs.

dialogue.text: Cel—my dress—it's getting tight!

panels.notes: First visible growth under adrenaline. Tier 2. Garments strain (coverage preserved).
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact); cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact)

panels.action: Ducking into a dark Poblacion alley, panting, they look at each other—both visibly taller, fuller, seams stretched.

dialogue.text: ...Ate. Why are you looking up at me less?

panels.notes: They notice the change on each other. Tier 2 hold. Stagger depth in the alley.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact); cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact)

panels.action: Hotel room. Hae-won stands against the door frame she measured at check-in; her head now clears the old mark by inches.

dialogue.text: I was here. This morning. I was *here*.

panels.notes: Concrete proof of growth. Tier 2-3. Quiet awe.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact); cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact)

panels.action: Cel flexes an arm experimentally; the muscle swells as her pulse jumps with excitement.

dialogue.text: Every time my heart races... it happens again. Watch.
I got scared, I grew. I get excited—

panels.notes: They CLOCK THE PATTERN: emotion spike = growth. Tier 3 micro-spike on the flex.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact); cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact)

panels.action: Low angle: the two of them, taller and fuller, framed against the bay window and the distant casino glow, grinning at a dawning idea.

dialogue.text: Then this city is full of ways to feel something.

panels.notes: Chapter-1 button. Low angle to sell the new scale. Casino glow = the playground ahead. Tier 3 close.
panels.costume_state: hae-won: cream linen sundress + straw sun hat, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact); cel: black ribbed tank + denim cutoffs, strained/seams stretched (coverage intact)
